title: Log Book Service
summary: Manufacturer-friendly scheduled servicing completed by mobile mechanics who keep your warranty needs in mind.
description: Nomad Auto Services performs log book servicing for everyday drivers, tradies, and fleet vehicles across Perth. We inspect key safety items, replace service parts as required, and provide clear service notes.
ideal_for: Drivers who want scheduled maintenance with mobile convenience and clear service notes.
what_you_get: Log book checks aligned to the vehicle schedule
Oil and filter service where required
Brake, steering, battery, and fluid inspection
sample_jobs: 60,000 km log book service for a family SUV
Pre-worksite log book service for a fleet ute
Routine service with fluid top-ups and report notes
common_signs: The car feels rough at idle
You need a stamped service record

title: Battery Replacements
summary: Fast battery testing, replacement, and roadside support when your car will not start.
description: We test your battery and charging system, recommend the right replacement, and get you moving without towing where possible.
ideal_for: Drivers stuck with slow cranking, flat batteries, or warning lights on the dash.
sample_jobs: Overnight flat battery at home
Battery replacement in a car park before work
Testing alternator charge before fitting a new battery

title: Brake Repairs
summary: Brake pad replacement, inspection, diagnosis, and practical repair advice.
description: From noisy brakes to worn pads, Nomad inspects the braking system and explains what is urgent, what can wait, and what the repair includes.
ideal_for: Drivers hearing squeals, grinding, or vibration when braking.
what_you_get: Pad, disc, caliper, and fluid inspection
sample_jobs: Front brake pad replacement on a commuter hatchback
Brake inspection before a long trip
Vibration diagnosis after a steering wheel shake
common_signs: Vehicle pulls left or right under braking

title: Cooling System Repairs
summary: Cooling system checks, leak diagnosis, coolant support, and overheating help.
description: We help diagnose overheating, coolant loss, radiator issues, hose failures, and related cooling system faults.
ideal_for: Drivers dealing with overheating, coolant smells, or a rising temperature gauge.
what_you_get: Leak inspection around hoses, radiator, and thermostat
sample_jobs: Intermittent overheating on the way to work
Coolant leak from a split hose
Radiator inspection after temperature spikes

title: Tradies & Fleet
summary: Mobile service support for utes, vans, tradie vehicles, and small fleets.
description: Keep vehicles on the road with scheduled servicing, brake support, oil changes, and fleet-friendly reporting.
ideal_for: Trades, service companies, and fleets that need repeat maintenance and less downtime.
what_you_get: Scheduled mobile servicing at your site
sample_jobs: Morning service for three work utes
Brake check before a job week begins
Oil and filter change between site runs
common_signs: Fleet records need to stay current

title: Car Service
summary: Fixed-price service packages for common maintenance work.
description: Choose from oil changes, basic service, full service, and brake service packages.
ideal_for: Drivers who want straightforward fixed-price maintenance online.
what_you_get: No upfront payment in MVP mock mode
sample_jobs: Oil change for a daily commuter
Full service for a family vehicle
Brake service package for a pre-trip check
common_signs: You want a clear package price
You need a simple online checkout

title: Car Repairs
summary: Mobile mechanic repair support for common faults and warning signs.
description: Nomad helps diagnose and repair practical vehicle issues with clear communication.
ideal_for: Drivers who need practical diagnosis before committing to a repair.
what_you_get: Support for warning lights and drivability issues
sample_jobs: Engine light diagnosis at home
Rough running inspection before parts are ordered
Starter, alternator, or sensor fault checks

title: Mobile Mechanic Car
summary: Mechanic support that comes to your home, worksite, or roadside location.
description: Book convenient mobile mechanic support with visible call and WhatsApp options.
ideal_for: Drivers who need a mechanic at home, at work, or roadside.
what_you_get: Fast triage over phone or WhatsApp
sample_jobs: Car park inspection before the school run
Driveway repair for a non-starting car
Worksite service call for a company car
common_signs: You need a mechanic to come to you
The vehicle cannot be driven safely

title: Prepurchase Vehicle Inspections Perth
summary: Practical inspection support before buying a used car.
description: Get a mobile inspection perspective before you commit to a vehicle.
ideal_for: Buyers who want a practical pre-purchase view before paying for a used vehicle.
sample_jobs: Used hatchback inspection before deposit
4WD check before buying from a private seller
Fleet replacement review for a business vehicle
common_signs: You are not sure about the vehicle's condition
You want a second opinion before buying
The seller cannot provide clear service history
